columns.name: ticket_id
columns.description: Ticket the reviewed draft belongs to.

columns.name: score
columns.description: Overall quality score 0-100 from the reply-coach agent.

columns.name: verdict
columns.description: ship = good to send, revise = needs edits, escalate = hand to a human.

columns.name: grounding
columns.description: How well the reply is backed by the knowledge base.

columns.name: issues
columns.description: Array of specific problems the coach found.
